mapper.sql: id, run_id, provider, source_api, source_billing_cycle, bill_date, line_hash, bill_account_id, bill_owner_id, payer_account_id, product_code, product_name, product_detail_code, product_detail, commodity_code, commodity_name, billing_item_code, billing_item, billing_type, subscription_type, instance_id, instance_name, region, zone, resource_group, cost_unit, usage_amount, usage_unit, pretax_gross_amount, invoice_discount, deductible_amount, pretax_amount, cash_amount, payment_amount, outstanding_amount, currency, tags, raw_payload, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM billing_audit_raw_line ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM billing_audit_raw_line WHERE run_id = #{runId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO billing_audit_raw_line ( run_id, provider, source_api, source_billing_cycle, bill_date, line_hash, bill_account_id, bill_owner_id, payer_account_id, product_code, product_name, product_detail_code, product_detail, commodity_code, commodity_name, billing_item_code, billing_item, billing_type, subscription_type, instance_id, instance_name, region, zone, resource_group, cost_unit, usage_amount, usage_unit, pretax_gross_amount, invoice_discount, deductible_amount, pretax_amount, cash_amount, payment_amount, outstanding_amount, currency, tags, raw_payload ) VALUES ( #{runId}, #{provider}, #{sourceApi}, #{sourceBillingCycle}, #{billDate}, #{lineHash}, #{billAccountId}, #{billOwnerId}, #{payerAccountId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{productDetailCode}, #{productDetail}, #{commodityCode}, #{commodityName}, #{billingItemCode}, #{billingItem}, #{billingType}, #{subscriptionType}, #{instanceId}, #{instanceName}, #{region}, #{zone}, #{resourceGroup}, #{costUnit}, #{usageAmount}, #{usageUnit}, #{pretaxGrossAmount}, #{invoiceDiscount}, #{deductibleAmount}, #{pretaxAmount}, #{cashAmount}, #{paymentAmount}, #{outstandingAmount}, #{currency}, #{tags}, #{rawPayload} )
mapper.update: UPDATE billing_audit_raw_line SET run_id = #{runId}, provider = #{provider}, source_api = #{sourceApi}, source_billing_cycle = #{sourceBillingCycle}, bill_date = #{billDate}, line_hash = #{lineHash}, bill_account_id = #{billAccountId}, bill_owner_id = #{billOwnerId}, payer_account_id = #{payerAccountId}, product_code = #{productCode}, product_name = #{productName}, product_detail_code = #{productDetailCode}, product_detail = #{productDetail}, commodity_code = #{commodityCode}, commodity_name = #{commodityName}, billing_item_code = #{billingItemCode}, billing_item = #{billingItem}, billing_type = #{billingType}, subscription_type = #{subscriptionType}, instance_id = #{instanceId}, instance_name = #{instanceName}, region = #{region}, zone = #{zone}, resource_group = #{resourceGroup}, cost_unit = #{costUnit}, usage_amount = #{usageAmount}, usage_unit = #{usageUnit}, pretax_gross_amount = #{pretaxGrossAmount}, invoice_discount = #{invoiceDiscount}, deductible_amount = #{deductibleAmount}, pretax_amount = #{pretaxAmount}, cash_amount = #{cashAmount}, payment_amount = #{paymentAmount}, outstanding_amount = #{outstandingAmount}, currency = #{currency}, tags = #{tags}, raw_payload = #{rawPayload} WHERE id = #{id}
